/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libpnc.so.0 -o libpnc.so.0.1.0 CMakeFiles/pnc.dir/src/comm/pnc_commux_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pnc.dir/src/comm/pnc_netcdf_io.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/commux/lib:/home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib: /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/commux/lib/libcommux.so /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so /home/chengcli/pyenv/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -lnetcdf
